title: Module 1
content:
Basics of Fire, Fire Triangle, Classification of Fires, Properties of
Combustible Materials, Calorific Value, Stoichiometric air, Standard Heat of
Combustion, Standard Enthalpy, Adiabatic Flame Temperature, Liquid Fuel
Properties - Flash Point, Fire Point, Boiling Point, Latent heat of
vaporization, Surface Tension, Marangoni Convection, Solid Fuel Properties
- Proximity Analysis, Heat of Pyrolysis, Latent Heat of Melting, Latent Heat
of Sublimation, Ignition Temperature, Critical Heat Flux, Thermal Inertia,
Thermal Response Parameter, Smoldering and factors affecting smoldering,
Backdraft, Smoke, Flame heat flux, Flame spread rate, Flame propagation
index, Heat release rate,

title: Module 2
content:
Estimation of- convective heat release, radiative heat release, smoke point,
Non-dimensional numbers for fire study, Heat calculations, Fire loading,
Standard heat of reaction, Oxygen calorimetry, Carbon-dioxide calorimetry,
Sensible enthalpy, Heat calculation for multicomponent fuel, Standard heat
of reaction of LPG, Enthalpy of formation of solid fuel, Equilibrium flame
temperature, Analysis of systems- Reaction at constant pressure, constant
volume,
Chemical
kinetics-
global
reaction,
elementary
reaction.
Molecularity of elementary reaction, Law of mass action, Molecularity and
Order, Rate of a reaction, Activated complex, rate coefficient, Equilibrium
constants, Net reaction rates, Global reaction rate,

title: Module 3
content:
Premixed and diffusion flames, Bunsen burner, Adiabatic flame temperature
vs. equivalence ratio, Laminar flame speed vs. equivalence ratio, Laminar
flame speed for various fuels, Structure of premixed flames, Preheat and
reaction zones, Formation of diffusion flames, Flammability limits,
Correlations for flammability limits, Premixed flame theories- thermal
theory, diffusion theory, comprehensive theory, Laminar flame speed, Flame
thickness, Premixed flame quenching, Quenching distance, Quenching
distance for various fuels, Laminar diffusion flame, Candle flame, Structure
of diffusion flame, Flame colour, Flame length, Soot formation, Soot
oxidation, Flame tip oscillations, Smoke point of saturated, unsaturated and
aromatic hydrocarbons.

title: Module 4
content:
Scaling analysis of diffusion flames, Flame Froude number- Momentum and
Buoyancy controlled flames, Roper's flame height correlation, Laminar
diffusion flame height correlations, Jet flame heights, Turbulent jet diffusion
flames, Flame life-off and blow off, Turbulent mass diffusivity, Eddy
viscosity, Turbulent mixing length, Turbulent intensity, Turbulent diffusion
flame height-Thomas and Heskested' correlations, Flame height of wall fires,
Mass diffusivity, Kinematic viscosity, Lewis number, Prandtl number,
Schmidt number, Chemical time, Residence time, Damkohler number,
Kinetically controlled and transport controlled fires, Classification of liquid
fuels based on flash point values, Liquid fuel evaporation- Steady
evaporation using Sfetan's problem, Fick's law, Burning of solid fuels
Analysis of fire plumes, Enclosure fires, Introduction to dust ignition, dust
explosion and forest fires, Fire safety aspects.
